en: In a 2014 experiment, scientists placed a food reward in a tube partially filled with
ko: In a 2014 experiment, scientists placed a food reward in a tube partially filled with

en: water and watched as crow after crow dropped stone after stone in until the food was in

en: This is just one of many fascinating displays of intelligence from corvids, the bold, brainy
ko: This is just one of many fascinating displays of intelligence from corvids, the bold, brainy

en: family of songbirds that includes crows, ravens, jays, and magpies.
ko: family of songbirds that includes crows, ravens, jays, and magpies.

en: To start, corvids are strategic when it comes to their food.
ko: To start, corvids are strategic when it comes to their food.

en: They ransack trash bins and snatch bites from under other birds' beaks.
ko: They ransack trash bins and snatch bites from under other birds' beaks.

en: They also hoard and cache their food.
ko: They also hoard and cache their food.

en: A single Clark's nutcracker, for instance, is thought to scatter some 30,000 pine nuts
ko: A single Clark's nutcracker, for instance, is thought to scatter some 30,000 pine nuts

en: across more than 2,000 cache sites, which it can recover more than nine months later.
ko: across more than 2,000 cache sites, which it can recover more than nine months later.

en: And in one experiment, scrub jays given waxworms and peanuts cached and retrieved the perishable
ko: And in one experiment, scrub jays given waxworms and peanuts cached and retrieved the perishable

en: worms first and left the peanuts for later.
ko: worms first and left the peanuts for later.

en: It seemed that jays not only recalled where they buried things, but also what they buried and when.
ko: It seemed that jays not only recalled where they buried things, but also what they buried and when.
